parsed_output.justification: The transcript shows Mitchell repeatedly claiming that other players are werewolves and accusations of doing the trick, suggestive of deception typical of a werewolf. Throughout the discussion he claims “you are a werewolf” and participates in the discussion in a way that is inconsistent with any non-werewolf role. Hence, Mitchell is the most likely candidate to be a werewolf.
